text:
Kakin's First King was, as per his title, the first monarch of what is now the Kakin Empire and the creator of the Seed Urn. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 33, Chapter 349 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

King Nasubi Hui Guo Rou mentions his ancestor the First King in a conversation he has with his butler Nugui. It is said in ancient Kakin manuscripts that the First King conjured the Seen Urn after being inspired by the dark magic known as "Worm Toxin". The Seed Urn was created amid turbulent times where the small country of Kakin would have been absorbed into any neighboring country at a moment's notice. This, however, was prevented with the creation of the Seed Urn, as it helped decided whom would become the next King of Kakin by making his children and descendants fight for unification. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 34, Chapter 362 

Abilities & Powers

As the ruler of Kakin, the First King must have wielded a degree of political and military power, although it was considered insignificant compared to that of neighboring countries. He had some knowledge of traditional magic, and specifically of the Worm Toxin ritual. 

Nen

The First King is responsible for conjuring the Seed Urn, the medium of a parasitic-type ability which endures to this day. It is unknown if he received any formal schooling in Nen, or if he was able to use any other abilities.
